converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Bruce T. Wilkins papers
Wilkins, Bruce T. (Bruce Tabor), 1931-
21-18-3240
7.3 cubic feet. 7.3 cubic feet.
1960-2002. Correspondence, Publications, Reports, Scrapbooks, Research Materials, Diaries Includes correspondence, memoranda, plans of work, course material and subject files, concerning Bruce Wilkins' career in the Dept. of Natural Resources (formerly the Dept. of Conservation) including material on fisheries and the Sea Grant Program. Collection material in English 4439481
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
May 2008
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, May 2008
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor Emeritus of Natural Resources, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, memoranda, plans of work, course material and subject files, concerning Bruce Wilkins' career in the Dept. of Natural Resources (formerly the Dept. of Conservation) including material on fisheries and the Sea Grant Program.
Cite As:
Bruce T. Wilkins papers, #21-18-3240. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Conservation of natural resources. Fisheries. Cornell University -- : Faculty. New York Sea Grant Extension Program Cornell University. Natural Resources Department Cornell University. Conservation Department
